Package tellui

Class TellUI

java.lang.Object
tellui.TellUI
public final class TellUI extends Object
Core facade for the TellUI library.

This class provides a simplified API for initializing and controlling the UI system. It follows the singleton pattern and must be initialized via init(PApplet) before any other methods are called.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • getContext

      public static processing.core.PApplet getContext()
      Returns the Processing sketch context used by TellUI.
      Returns:
      the PApplet instance
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if TellUI has not been initialized (i.e. init(PApplet) was not called)

    • getVersion

      public static String getVersion()
      Returns the version of the TellUI library.
      Returns:
      the version string in the format "MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH"

    • init

      public static TellUI init(processing.core.PApplet pApplet)
      Initializes the TellUI library with the given Processing sketch context.

      This method must be called exactly once before using any other functionality. Subsequent calls will throw an exception.

      Parameters:
      pApplet - the Processing sketch (must not be null)
      Returns:
      the singleton TellUI instance
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if pApplet is null
      IllegalStateException - if TellUI has already been initialized

    • setToast

      public TellUI setToast(String text, long ms)
      Shows a toast message for the specified duration.
      Parameters:
      text - the toast message (must not be null or blank)
      ms - the duration in milliseconds (must be positive)
      Returns:
      this TellUI instance (for chaining)

    • setToast

      public TellUI setToast(String text)
      Shows a toast message for the default duration (1000 ms).
      Parameters:
      text - the toast message (must not be null or blank)
      Returns:
      this TellUI instance (for chaining)

    • setDebugEnabled

      public TellUI setDebugEnabled(boolean enabled)
      Enables or disables debug output for the UI system.
      Parameters:
      enabled - true to enable debug, false to disable
      Returns:
      this TellUI instance (for chaining)

    • addContainer

      public Container addContainer(Container container)
      Adds a container to the UI system.
      Parameters:
      container - the container to add (must not be null)
      Returns:
      the added container

    • addContainer

      public Container addContainer(LayoutManager layoutManager)
      Creates and adds a new container with the specified layout manager.
      Parameters:
      layoutManager - the layout manager for the new container (must not be null)
      Returns:
      the newly created container

    • addContainer

      public Container addContainer(LayoutManager layoutManager, String textId)
      Creates and adds a new container with the specified layout manager and text identifier.
      Parameters:
      layoutManager - the layout manager for the new container (must not be null)
      textId - the text identifier for the container
      Returns:
      the newly created container with the given textId

    • addContainer

      public Container addContainer(LayoutManager layoutManager, int id)
      Creates and adds a new container with the specified layout manager and numeric identifier.
      Parameters:
      layoutManager - the layout manager for the new container (must not be null)
      id - the numeric identifier for the container
      Returns:
      the newly created container with the given id

    • removeContainer

      public void removeContainer(Container container)
      Removes the specified container from the UI system.
      Parameters:
      container - the container to remove (must not be null)

    • removeContainer

      public void removeContainer(String textId)
      Removes the container with the specified text identifier.
      Parameters:
      textId - the text identifier of the container to remove (must not be null)

    • removeContainer

      public void removeContainer(int id)
      Removes the container with the specified numeric identifier.
      Parameters:
      id - the numeric identifier of the container to remove

    • getContainer

      public Container getContainer(String textId)
      Retrieves the container with the specified text identifier.
      Parameters:
      textId - the text identifier of the container (must not be null or blank)
      Returns:
      the container with the given textId

    • getContainer

      public Container getContainer(int id)
      Retrieves the container with the specified numeric identifier.
      Parameters:
      id - the numeric identifier of the container
      Returns:
      the container with the given id

    • findContainer

      public Container findContainer(String textId)
      Finds a container by its text identifier. Returns null if not found.
      Parameters:
      textId - the text identifier of the container
      Returns:
      the container with the given textId, or null if none found

    • findContainer

      public Container findContainer(int id)
      Finds a container by its numeric identifier. Returns null if not found.
      Parameters:
      id - the numeric identifier of the container
      Returns:
      the container with the given id, or null if none found

    • navigateTo

      public TellUI navigateTo(Container container)
      Navigates to the specified container with the default transition.
      Parameters:
      container - the target container (must not be null)
      Returns:
      this TellUI instance (for chaining)

    • navigateTo

      public TellUI navigateTo(String textId)
      Navigates to the container with the specified text identifier using the default transition.
      Parameters:
      textId - the text identifier of the target container (must not be null)
      Returns:
      this TellUI instance (for chaining)

    • navigateTo

      public TellUI navigateTo(int id)
      Navigates to the container with the specified numeric identifier using the default transition.
      Parameters:
      id - the numeric identifier of the target container
      Returns:
      this TellUI instance (for chaining)

    • navigateTo

      public TellUI navigateTo(Container container, Transition transition)
      Navigates to the specified container using the given transition.
      Parameters:
      container - the target container (must not be null)
      transition - the transition effect to use (must not be null)
      Returns:
      this TellUI instance (for chaining)

    • navigateTo

      public TellUI navigateTo(Container container, int transition)
      Navigates to the specified container using a predefined transition identified by a constant. The constant must be one of LEFT, RIGHT, UP, or DOWN from PConstants.
      Parameters:
      container - the target container (must not be null)
      transition - the transition constant (LEFT, RIGHT, UP, DOWN)
      Returns:
      this TellUI instance (for chaining)

    • navigateTo

      public TellUI navigateTo(String textId, Transition transition)
      Navigates to the container with the specified text identifier using the given transition.
      Parameters:
      textId - the text identifier of the target container (must not be null)
      transition - the transition effect to use (must not be null)
      Returns:
      this TellUI instance (for chaining)

    • navigateTo

      public TellUI navigateTo(String textId, int transition)
      Navigates to the container with the specified text identifier using a predefined transition constant.
      Parameters:
      textId - the text identifier of the target container (must not be null)
      transition - the transition constant (LEFT, RIGHT, UP, DOWN)
      Returns:
      this TellUI instance (for chaining)

    • navigateTo

      public TellUI navigateTo(int id, Transition transition)
      Navigates to the container with the specified numeric identifier using the given transition.
      Parameters:
      id - the numeric identifier of the target container
      transition - the transition effect to use (must not be null)
      Returns:
      this TellUI instance (for chaining)

    • navigateTo

      public TellUI navigateTo(int id, int transition)
      Navigates to the container with the specified numeric identifier using a predefined transition constant.
      Parameters:
      id - the numeric identifier of the target container
      transition - the transition constant (LEFT, RIGHT, UP, DOWN)
      Returns:
      this TellUI instance (for chaining)

    • isTransitionEnabled

      public boolean isTransitionEnabled()
      Returns whether transitions are enabled globally.
      Returns:
      true if transitions are enabled, false otherwise

    • setTransitionEnabled

      public TellUI setTransitionEnabled(boolean enabled)
      Enables or disables transitions globally.
      Parameters:
      enabled - true to enable transitions, false to disable
      Returns:
      this TellUI instance (for chaining)

    • setSurfaceIcon

      public TellUI setSurfaceIcon(processing.core.PImage icon)
      Sets the icon for the application surface (window).
      Parameters:
      icon - the icon image (must not be null)
      Returns:
      this TellUI instance (for chaining)

    • setSurfaceTitle

      public TellUI setSurfaceTitle(String title)
      Sets the title of the application surface (window).
      Parameters:
      title - the window title (must not be null)
      Returns:
      this TellUI instance (for chaining)

    • setSurfaceLocation

      public TellUI setSurfaceLocation(int x, int y)
      Sets the location of the application surface on the screen.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate
      y - the y-coordinate
      Returns:
      this TellUI instance (for chaining)

    • setSurfaceResizable

      public TellUI setSurfaceResizable(boolean enabled)
      Sets whether the application surface is resizable by the user.
      Parameters:
      enabled - true to allow resizing, false to disallow
      Returns:
      this TellUI instance (for chaining)

    • addOnSurfaceResizeListener

      public TellUI addOnSurfaceResizeListener(Listener listener)
      Adds a listener to be notified when the surface is resized.
      Parameters:
      listener - the listener to add (must not be null)
      Returns:
      this TellUI instance (for chaining)

    • removeOnSurfaceResizeListener

      public TellUI removeOnSurfaceResizeListener(Listener listener)
      Removes a previously added surface resize listener.
      Parameters:
      listener - the listener to remove (must not be null)
      Returns:
      this TellUI instance (for chaining)
